channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lili Reinhart and Lola Tung Lead a Coven of Witchy Mean Girls in “Forbidden Fruits ”Trailer
item.description: Victoria Pedretti, Alexandra Shipp and Emma Chamberlain also star in the horror comedy, out March 27

item.title: Nika Diwa Reveals How Husband Emeka Ihedigbo 'Raises the Bar' for Her and Their Daughters on Valentine's Day (Exclusive)
item.description: The influencer and mom of three opened up with PEOPLE about how she and her family are celebrating the holiday with a newborn baby

item.title: 'RichTok' Influencer Becca Bloom Shows Off the $2,200 Box of 250 Roses She Got for Valentine’s Day
item.description: The content creator, known for showing off her lavish lifestyle, revealed her latest gift on TikTok

item.title: Lux Pascal Says Brother Pedro Was 'Over the Roof' After Ryan Murphy Cast Her on “The Beauty” (Exclusive)
item.description: The actress joined the FX thriller as Clara, making her debut in episode 6

item.title: Miss Jamaica Shares Photos from Hospital Bed and Rehab 3 Months After Horrific Fall on Pageant Stage
item.description: Gabrielle Henry was competing during one of the Miss Universe pageant's preliminary rounds in November, when she tumbled off the stage

item.title: Influencer Yonna Jay Says Streaming Is Replacing TV
item.description: Television is going the way of the dodo, a popular influencer says ... because streaming is on the way to usurp the old mass media technology. We caug...

item.title: Britney Spears Seen Out for First Time Since Selling Music Catalog
item.description: Britney Spears is carrying on as if nothing happened ... spotted doing everyday errands like she didn’t just cash in one of the most iconic catalogs i...

item.title: 'Love Island' Jeremiah Brown Says Valentine's Day Looks 'Bleak' for Him
item.description: Looks like Jeremiah Brown’s "Love Island" luck didn’t follow him back to the mainland ... 'cause he tells us his Valentine’s Day is shaping up to be a...

item.title: Stefon Diggs Pleads Not Guilty Assaulting Chef Days After Super Bowl
item.description: Stefon Diggs appeared in court on Friday for his arraignment over the alleged assault of his personal chef, with the NFL star pleading not guilty just...

item.title: Cop Pulls Woman From Burning Vehicle After Carjacking Crash, on Video
item.description: Police in Florida saved a woman from a burning car in the nick of time ... after an alleged carjacker stole another vehicle with a baby inside and cra...
